message:
feat(gateway): comprehensive code review fixes and UX audit beads

Code exploration bug fixes:
- Fix DCG addToAllowlist to build entry conditionally for exactOptionalPropertyTypes
- Fix history service CSV escaping for proper quote handling
- Fix ws/handlers backfill case sensitivity
- Fix various route handlers for exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance

New features:
- Add RU routes for fleet management API
- Add ring buffer iteration helpers

UX/DX audit:
- Create 31 beads (12 epics, 19 tasks) documenting Stripe-level API improvements
- Response envelope standardization, pagination, validation errors
- AI hints integration, HATEOAS links, rate limiting headers
- Comprehensive dependency structure for parallel execution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
